codes.description: Rheumatoid arthritis with rheumatoid factor, unspecified
Rheumatoid lung disease with rheumatoid arthritis, unspecified site
Rheumatoid heart disease with rheumatoid arthritis, unspecified site
Rheumatoid arthritis without rheumatoid factor, unspecified site
Unspecified juvenile rheumatoid arthritis, unspecified site

rheumatoid_arthritis.notes: Use M05.x for seropositive RA, M06.x for seronegative RA. M06.9 is a broad catch-all.

codes.description: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic neuropathy, unspecified
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with unspecified diabetic retinopathy without macular edema
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with hypoglycemia without coma
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic nephropathy
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic peripheral angiopathy without gangrene

type2_diabetes.notes: E11.x is type 2 diabetes. Use E10.x for type 1. Consider requiring ≥2 outpatient or 1 inpatient code for case definition.

atrial_fibrillation.notes: I48.91 is the most commonly used unspecified code. I48.0 for paroxysmal AF. Include I48.3/I48.4 for atrial flutter if relevant.

codes.description: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with acute lower respiratory infection
Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with acute exacerbation

copd.notes: J44.x is the primary COPD code family. J44.9 is most frequently used in claims. Consider spirometry-confirmed definitions for clinical studies.

asthma.notes: J45.909 is most common in administrative data. Severity subtyping (J45.2x–J45.5x) rarely coded consistently in claims.

heart_failure.notes: I50.9 is broad catch-all. I50.2x for HFrEF (systolic), I50.3x for HFpEF (diastolic). Hospitalization-based definitions recommended.

codes.description: Hypertensive heart disease without heart failure
Hypertensive chronic kidney disease with stage 1 through stage 4 chronic kidney disease
Hypertensive heart and chronic kidney disease without heart failure

hypertension.notes: I10 is the primary code for essential hypertension. Most prevalent chronic condition in administrative claims.

chronic_kidney_disease.notes: Stage-specific codes available in ICD-10. N18.6 for ESRD (dialysis/transplant eligible). Claims coding of CKD stage is often inaccurate.

codes.description: Crohn's disease of small intestine without complications
Crohn's disease of large intestine without complications

inflammatory_bowel_disease.notes: K50.x = Crohn's disease, K51.x = Ulcerative colitis. Use K50.90 and K51.90 for unspecified IBD in claims studies.

codes.description: Age-related osteoporosis without current pathological fracture
Age-related osteoporosis with current pathological fracture, unspecified site, initial encounter
Other osteoporosis without current pathological fracture
Other specified disorders of bone density and structure, unspecified site

osteoporosis.notes: M81.0 for primary osteoporosis. M80.x for osteoporosis with pathological fracture. Z87.310 for history of fracture as covariate.
